## Use Cases

WHEN: test writing, Pester framework, unit testing, integration testing, mocking, test design, code coverage, CI/CD testing, test organization, test patterns.

DO NOT USE FOR: script development (use powershell-scripting), code analysis (use powershell-review), security testing (use powershell-security), Azure-specific testing (use powershell-azure).
